text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I move through this bright, clean hallway into a space dedicated to research and development. The colorful wall, screens, and thoughtfully arranged displays suggest a celebration of human creativity alongside technology. There is an energy here—the promise of discovery, but also a slight apprehension at the unknown potentials that innovation holds. I am inspired to reflect on my role within this evolving relationship between people and intelligent machines.
